app.title: VibeRPG
app.createFirstHero: Create your first hero and embark on an epic journey
app.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this character? This action cannot be undone.
inventory.title: Inventory
shop.title: Shop
quests.title: Quest Log
quests.noQuests: No quests available for your class and level.
quests.needRecover: You were injured in battle and need to recover.
guild.title: Guild Evolution
descriptions.apprenticeStaff: A basic staff for aspiring mages.
descriptions.noviceRobe: Simple robes worn by magic apprentices.
descriptions.apprenticeHat: A simple pointed hat for magic apprentices.
descriptions.ironSword: A sturdy iron sword for warriors.
descriptions.warriorHelmet: A sturdy helmet for protecting warriors in battle.
descriptions.priestsRobes: Holy robes blessed with divine magic.
descriptions.priestsHat: A holy hat blessed with divine energy.
descriptions.holyPendant: A pendant imbued with holy energy.
descriptions.food-bread: Tough to chew, but it fills the stomach.
descriptions.food-milk: A refreshing drink that restores magical energy.
descriptions.food-meat: A hearty piece of meat that satisfies hunger.
descriptions.food-beer: A strong ale that vitalizes both body and mind.
descriptions.food-honey-cake: A sweet treat baked with wild honey. Restores both health and mana.
descriptions.food-elixir-soup: A magical broth infused with rare herbs. Healers swear by its restorative properties.
descriptions.food-dragon-fruit: A fiery fruit that burns with inner warmth. Consumed by adventurers seeking great restoration.
descriptions.potion-health-minor: A basic red potion that mends small wounds.
descriptions.potion-health: A potent red potion that accelerates natural healing.
descriptions.potion-health-major: A powerful crimson elixir that can bring an adventurer back from the brink of death.
descriptions.potion-mana-minor: A shimmering blue potion that replenishes magical energy.
descriptions.potion-mana: A deep blue elixir that surges with arcane power.
descriptions.potion-mana-major: A radiant azure draught that overflows with magical essence.
descriptions.potion-elixir-vitality: A legendary golden potion that restores both body and spirit to peak condition.
descriptions.potion-strength: A bubbling red concoction that temporarily boosts physical power.
descriptions.potion-defense: A metallic potion that hardens the skin like iron.
descriptions.potion-magic: A swirling purple elixir that amplifies magical abilities.
descriptions.scroll-teleport: A magical scroll that returns you to safety while mending minor injuries.
descriptions.crystal-healing: A glowing crystal that channels restorative energy when crushed.
descriptions.amulet-revival: A radiant feather from a phoenix. When used, it bestows incredible healing power.
descriptions.mystic-ring: An ancient jewelry piece that pulses with the heartbeat of the cosmos.
descriptions.steel-buckler: A shield forged from the scales of a celestial dragon.
descriptions.silver-dagger: A silent, ethereal blade that seems to phase through armor.
descriptions.holy-relic: A crown of pure sunlight that blinds those who would strike you.
descriptions.fire-staff: The heat radiating from this staff can ignite the very air.
descriptions.knight-armor: A colossal set of armor that makes you feel like an immovable object.
descriptions.divine-robes: Robes that bleed between realities, granting near-infinite magical flow.
battle.notEnoughMp: ❌ Not enough MP to cast spell!
battle.spellDamage: You cast a spell for {damage} magic damage!
battle.fleeFail: ❌ Failed to flee! The enemy catches you!
quest.conqueredAll: You've conquered all challenges in this region. Return later for more epic quests.
guild.title: Adventurer's Guild
guild.subtitle: Evolve your rank and unlock legendary potential
guild.legend: You have attained the pinnacle of power. You are a true Legend of VibeRPG.
quests.mage-library.title: The Cursed Library
quests.mage-library.description: The field library has been overtaken by wild magic. Books float everywhere and the librarian is trapped in a magical barrier.
quests.mage-library.choice1: Cast Dispel Magic to break the barrier
quests.mage-library.choice2: Use Sense Magic to find the source
quests.mage-library.choice3: Try to reason with the magical disturbance
quests.mage-library.success1: Your dispel magic works! The barrier shatters and the librarian is freed.
quests.mage-library.failure1: Your magic fizzles against the barrier. The wild magic is too strong!
quests.mage-library.success2: You sense a wild spellbook causing the chaos. With precision, you neutralize it!
quests.mage-library.failure2: The magical feedback is too overwhelming. You retreat to regroup.
quests.mage-library.success3: Through careful negotiation with the sentient magic, you calm the wild energies.
quests.mage-library.failure3: The magical entity doesn't understand your words. It lashes out!
quests.mage-apprentice.title: The Missing Apprentice
quests.mage-apprentice.description: A young apprentice has gone missing in the forest. The elder says they were studying magical herbs.
quests.mage-apprentice.choice1: Use Sense Magic to locate them
quests.mage-apprentice.choice2: Cast an illusion to lure them out
quests.mage-apprentice.success1: You sense the apprentice's magical aura nearby! They're trapped in a magical bramble.
quests.mage-apprentice.failure1: The forest's natural magic interferes with your senses. You find nothing.
quests.mage-apprentice.success2: Your illusion distracts the magical creatures, allowing the apprentice to escape!
quests.mage-apprentice.failure2: The creatures see through your illusion. They become agitated!
quests.mage-elemental.title: The Elemental Disturbance
quests.mage-elemental.description: An earth elemental has awakened near the village and is blocking the main road. The villagers are frightened.
quests.mage-elemental.choice1: Challenge the elemental in a magical duel
quests.mage-elemental.choice3: Banish the elemental back to its plane
quests.mage-elemental.success1: Your magical prowess overwhelms the elemental! It retreats deep underground.
quests.mage-elemental.failure1: The elemental's power is immense. You're pushed back by the sheer force of earth!
quests.mage-elemental.success2: Through ancient magical words, you convince the elemental to guard the field instead!
quests.mage-elemental.failure2: The elemental doesn't understand your magical language. It roars in confusion!
quests.mage-elemental.success3: With a powerful banishment spell, you send the elemental back to the elemental plane!
quests.mage-elemental.failure3: Your banishment fails! The elemental grows angrier!
quests.warrior-village.title: Field Protection
quests.warrior-village.description: Bandits are attacking the northern field! The field commander needs someone to defend the area.
quests.warrior-village.choice1: Stand at the field entrance and fight them head-on!
quests.warrior-village.choice2: Lead a charge to scatter them
quests.warrior-village.success1: Your fierce fighting scares off the bandits! The field is safe.
quests.warrior-village.failure1: There are too many bandits! You hold them off but they ransack the camp.
quests.warrior-village.success2: Your leadership and combat skills turn the tide! The bandits flee in panic.
quests.warrior-village.failure2: The bandits anticipate your charge. You're surrounded!
quests.warrior-duel.title: The Duel of Honor
quests.warrior-duel.description: A proud knight has challenged any warrior to a duel. Win and earn respect and rewards!
quests.warrior-duel.choice1: Use raw strength to overpower them
quests.warrior-duel.success1: Your powerful strikes overwhelm the knight! You win the duel!
quests.warrior-duel.failure1: The knight is more skilled than expected. You lose the duel.
quests.warrior-duel.success2: You deflect their attacks perfectly and find an opening for victory!
quests.warrior-duel.failure2: Their technique is flawless. You cannot find a weakness!
quests.priest-plague.title: The Plagued Field
quests.priest-plague.description: A mysterious illness is spreading through the southern field. The healer needs help finding the cure.
quests.priest-plague.choice1: Use healing magic on the sick
quests.priest-plague.choice2: Search for medicinal herbs in the forest
quests.priest-plague.success1: Your holy magic cures the villagers! They recover quickly.
quests.priest-plague.failure1: The plague is stronger than your magic. More people fall ill!
quests.priest-plague.success2: You find the rare healing herbs. The cure is made!
quests.priest-plague.failure2: You cannot find the right herbs. Time is running out!
quests.priest-plague.success3: Your purification ritual cleanses the water! The source of illness is gone.
quests.priest-plague.failure3: The contamination is too severe. The ritual fails!
quests.guild-bounty-slimes.title: Guild Bounty: Slime Infestation
quests.guild-bounty-slimes.description: The Adventurer's Guild has posted a bounty for clearing slimes from the eastern farmlands. A quick job for quick gold.
quests.guild-bounty-slimes.success1: Your flames incinerate the slimes! The farmers pay handsomely.
quests.guild-bounty-slimes.failure1: The slimes resist your magic! You need a different approach.
quests.guild-bounty-slimes.success2: You carefully collect the slimes. The alchemist pays extra for specimens!
quests.guild-bounty-slimes.failure2: The slime dissolves the bucket. What a mess!
quests.guild-bounty-rats.title: Guild Bounty: Giant Rats
quests.guild-bounty-rats.description: The tavern cellar is overrun with giant rats. The innkeeper will pay well for a clean sweep.
quests.guild-bounty-rats.choice1: Charge in and smash them all!
quests.guild-bounty-rats.success1: You clear the cellar in minutes! The innkeeper rewards you generously.
quests.guild-bounty-rats.failure1: There are too many rats! They overwhelm you!
quests.guild-bounty-rats.success2: Your traps work perfectly! The rats are caught one by one.
quests.guild-bounty-rats.failure2: The rats are too clever for your traps!
quests.guild-bounty-undead.title: Guild Bounty: Graveyard Shift
quests.guild-bounty-undead.description: Skeletons have been spotted wandering the old graveyard at night. The church offers a bounty for their destruction.
quests.guild-bounty-undead.choice1: Purify the undead with holy light
quests.guild-bounty-undead.choice2: Smash their bones with your mace
quests.guild-bounty-undead.success1: Your holy magic returns the skeletons to their graves! The priest pays well.
quests.guild-bounty-undead.failure1: The undead resist your purification! They're too strong!
quests.guild-bounty-undead.success2: You shatter the skeletons! The bones scatter across the graveyard.
quests.guild-bounty-undead.failure2: The skeletons dodge your swings! They're surprisingly agile!
quests.guild-escort-merchant.title: Guild Contract: Merchant Escort
quests.guild-escort-merchant.description: A nervous merchant needs an escort through the forest. The guild guarantees payment upon safe arrival.
quests.guild-escort-merchant.choice1: Walk ahead and clear the path
quests.guild-escort-merchant.choice2: Stay close and guard the merchant
quests.guild-escort-merchant.success1: You dispatch the bandits before they reach the merchant! Full payment received.
quests.guild-escort-merchant.failure1: Bandits ambush from the trees! The merchant is robbed!
quests.guild-escort-merchant.success2: Your vigilant guard protects the merchant throughout the journey!
quests.guild-escort-merchant.failure2: A thief slips past you and steals from the merchant's cart!
quests.guild-herb-gathering.title: Guild Contract: Rare Herbs
quests.guild-herb-gathering.description: The guild alchemist needs rare herbs from the dangerous swamps. Double pay for hazardous work.
quests.guild-herb-gathering.choice1: Use nature magic to find the herbs
quests.guild-herb-gathering.success1: Your magic guides you to the rarest specimens! The alchemist is thrilled.
quests.guild-herb-gathering.failure1: The swamp's toxic magic interferes with your senses!
quests.guild-herb-gathering.success2: You fight through the swamp creatures and gather the herbs!
quests.guild-herb-gathering.failure2: A giant snake guards the herbs! You retreat wounded!
quests.guild-treasure-hunt.title: Guild Contract: Lost Treasure
quests.guild-treasure-hunt.description: An old map shows buried treasure in the caves. The guild wants a cut for providing the map.
quests.guild-treasure-hunt.choice2: Fight your way to the treasure
quests.guild-treasure-hunt.success1: You slip past the guardians unnoticed! The treasure is yours!
quests.guild-treasure-hunt.failure1: The guardians spot you! You're forced to flee empty-handed!
quests.guild-treasure-hunt.success2: You defeat the guardians in combat! The treasure glitters in your torchlight!
quests.guild-treasure-hunt.failure2: The cave guardians are too powerful! You barely escape!
quests.guild-monster-hunt.title: Guild Contract: Monster Hunt
quests.guild-monster-hunt.description: A powerful beast has been terrorizing the mountain pass. The guild offers a massive bounty for its head.
quests.guild-monster-hunt.choice1: Challenge the beast to single combat
quests.guild-monster-hunt.success1: You slay the mighty beast! The guild rewards you handsomely!
quests.guild-monster-hunt.failure1: The beast is too powerful! You retreat to fight another day!
quests.guild-monster-hunt.success2: Your trap catches the beast! A clean kill with minimal risk!
quests.guild-monster-hunt.failure2: The beast avoids your trap and charges!
quests.guild-arcane-research.title: Guild Contract: Arcane Research
quests.guild-arcane-research.description: The mage guild needs someone to collect magical essence from wild spirits. Dangerous but lucrative.
quests.guild-arcane-research.success1: You extract pure magical essence! The mages pay a premium!
quests.guild-arcane-research.failure1: The essence explodes in your hands! The spirits are angered!
quests.guild-arcane-research.success2: The spirits gift you their essence willingly! A peaceful exchange.
quests.guild-arcane-research.failure2: The spirits don't trust you. They vanish into the mist!
quests.warrior-monster.title: The Monster Nest
quests.warrior-monster.description: A nest of man-eating wolves has appeared near the trade route. Merchants are afraid to pass.
quests.warrior-monster.choice2: Set a trap and lure them out
quests.warrior-monster.success1: Your ferocity is terrifying! The wolves flee from their own nest!
quests.warrior-monster.failure1: There are too many wolves! You're forced to retreat temporarily.
quests.warrior-monster.success2: Your trap works perfectly! You defeat the wolves efficiently.
quests.warrior-monster.failure2: The wolves are smarter than expected. They avoid your trap!
quests.warrior-orc-camp.title: The Orc Encampment
quests.warrior-orc-camp.description: Orcs have set up a war camp near the dark forest. Their raiding parties grow bolder each night.
quests.warrior-orc-camp.choice1: Challenge the orc chieftain to single combat
quests.warrior-orc-camp.choice2: Lead a night raid on their supplies
quests.warrior-orc-camp.success1: You defeat the chieftain! Without a leader, the orcs scatter!
quests.warrior-orc-camp.failure1: The orc chieftain is incredibly powerful! You barely escape!
quests.warrior-orc-camp.success2: You destroy their food stores, forcing the orcs to retreat!
quests.warrior-orc-camp.failure2: The orc sentries spot you! You fight your way out!
quests.warrior-dragon-lair.title: The Dragon's Lair
quests.warrior-dragon-lair.description: A wyvern has taken residence in the mountain pass, terrorizing travelers and demanding tribute.
quests.warrior-dragon-lair.choice1: Face the wyvern head-on with sword and shield
quests.warrior-dragon-lair.choice2: Use the terrain to your advantage
quests.warrior-dragon-lair.success1: Your blade finds the gap in the wyvern's scales! It falls defeated!
quests.warrior-dragon-lair.failure1: The wyvern's flames nearly incinerate you! You retreat badly burned!
quests.warrior-dragon-lair.success2: You lure the wyvern into a narrow passage where it can't fly! Victory!
quests.warrior-dragon-lair.failure2: The wyvern is smarter than you expected. It corners you instead!
quests.mage-crystalcave.title: The Crystal Caverns
quests.mage-crystalcave.description: Strange magical crystals have been growing in the old mines, attracting dangerous creatures. The miners need your help.
quests.mage-crystalcave.choice1: Harness the crystal energy to blast the creatures
quests.mage-crystalcave.choice2: Create a protective ward around the miners
quests.mage-crystalcave.success1: You channel the crystal energy into a devastating arcane blast!
quests.mage-crystalcave.failure1: The crystal energy is unstable and backfires on you!
quests.mage-crystalcave.success2: Your magical barrier holds firm, allowing the miners to escape safely!
quests.mage-crystalcave.failure2: The creatures overwhelm your ward with sheer numbers!
quests.mage-tower.title: The Dark Mage's Tower
quests.mage-tower.description: A rogue mage has taken up residence in the old watchtower, conducting dangerous experiments that threaten the region.
quests.mage-tower.choice1: Engage in a full magical duel
quests.mage-tower.success1: Your superior magical knowledge wins the duel! The dark mage surrenders!
quests.mage-tower.failure1: The dark mage's forbidden spells prove too powerful!
quests.mage-tower.success2: You systematically unravel the wards, leaving the mage vulnerable!
quests.mage-tower.failure2: A trap spell triggers, blasting you backwards!
quests.priest-ghost.title: The Ghost's Regret
quests.priest-ghost.description: A restless spirit haunts the old church. It seems to be searching for something.
quests.priest-ghost.choice1: Use Holy Light to banish the spirit
quests.priest-ghost.choice2: Listen to the spirit's story and help it
quests.priest-ghost.success1: The Holy Light reveals the spirit's burden. You help it find peace.
quests.priest-ghost.failure1: The spirit resists your magic. It's too powerful!
quests.priest-ghost.success2: Through compassionate listening, you learn of its unfinished business. You help complete it.
quests.priest-ghost.failure2: The spirit cannot communicate. It remains restless!
quests.priest-blessing.title: The Field Blessing
quests.priest-blessing.description: The field elder asks you to perform a blessing ritual to protect the field from evil forces.
quests.priest-blessing.choice2: Place protective wards around the field
quests.priest-blessing.success1: The blessing is successful! A protective aura surrounds the field.
quests.priest-blessing.failure1: The ritual drains your energy. You barely complete it!
quests.priest-blessing.success2: Your wards are strong! The field is now protected.
quests.priest-blessing.failure2: Some wards fail to activate. The field remains vulnerable.
quests.priest-undead-crypt.title: The Undead Crypt
quests.priest-undead-crypt.description: The ancient crypt beneath the church has been unsealed. Undead creatures pour forth each night.
quests.priest-undead-crypt.choice2: Seal the crypt with divine wards
quests.priest-undead-crypt.success1: Your holy power banishes the undead back to their graves!
quests.priest-undead-crypt.failure1: Too many undead! Your holy power is overwhelmed!
quests.priest-undead-crypt.success2: The divine seals hold! No more undead can escape!
quests.priest-undead-crypt.failure2: The dark energy within cracks your seals!
quests.priest-demon-portal.title: The Demon Portal
quests.priest-demon-portal.description: A portal to the underworld has opened in the cursed ruins. Demons are spilling into the world.
quests.priest-demon-portal.choice1: Channel divine power to close the portal
quests.priest-demon-portal.success1: With an explosion of holy light, you seal the portal forever!
quests.priest-demon-portal.failure1: The demonic energy is overwhelming! The portal resists!
quests.priest-demon-portal.success2: You smite the gatekeeper with divine fury! The portal collapses!
quests.priest-demon-portal.failure2: The demon's dark power scorches your holy shields!
enemies.green-slime.name: Green Slime
enemies.green-slime.description: A jiggling mass of green goo. Weak but plentiful.
enemies.giant-rat.name: Giant Rat
enemies.giant-rat.description: A disease-ridden rodent the size of a dog.
enemies.wild-boar.name: Wild Boar
enemies.wild-boar.description: A tusked beast that charges with savage fury.
enemies.terror-hawk.name: Terror Hawk
enemies.terror-hawk.description: A massive bird of prey with razor-sharp talons.
enemies.dire-bear.name: Dire Bear
enemies.dire-bear.description: An enormous bear corrupted by dark energy. Massive and relentless.
enemies.wolf-pack.name: Wolf Pack
enemies.wolf-pack.description: A fierce pack of man-eating wolves guarding their nest.
enemies.skeleton-soldier.name: Skeleton Soldier
enemies.skeleton-soldier.description: An animated pile of bones wielding a rusty sword.
enemies.zombie.name: Shambling Zombie
enemies.zombie.description: A decaying corpse that hungers for the living.
enemies.wraith.name: Wraith
enemies.wraith.description: A spectral being of pure malice that drains life force.
enemies.lich.name: Lich
enemies.lich.description: An undead sorcerer of terrible power, sustained by dark magic.
enemies.death-knight.name: Death Knight
enemies.death-knight.description: A fallen paladin who serves darkness, clad in cursed black armor.
enemies.restless-ghost.name: Restless Ghost
enemies.restless-ghost.description: A sorrowful spirit unable to find peace.
enemies.fire-sprite.name: Fire Sprite
enemies.fire-sprite.description: A tiny flame spirit that dances through the air.
enemies.ice-golem.name: Ice Golem
enemies.ice-golem.description: A construct of frozen ice, slow but incredibly tough.
enemies.thunder-hawk.name: Thunder Hawk
enemies.thunder-hawk.description: A storm bird that crackles with electrical energy.
enemies.water-serpent.name: Water Serpent
enemies.water-serpent.description: A sinuous aquatic creature that strikes from the depths.
enemies.earth-elemental.name: Earth Elemental
enemies.earth-elemental.description: A massive construct of rock and earth.
enemies.storm-djinn.name: Storm Djinn
enemies.storm-djinn.description: An ancient wind spirit of devastating magical power.
enemies.treant.name: Ancient Treant
enemies.treant.description: A massive walking tree corrupted by fungal spores.
enemies.mushroom-horror.name: Mushroom Horror
enemies.mushroom-horror.description: A sentient fungus that releases toxic spores.
enemies.giant-spider.name: Giant Spider
enemies.giant-spider.description: A venomous arachnid lurking in dark caves.
enemies.mantis-warrior.name: Mantis Warrior
enemies.mantis-warrior.description: A blade-armed insectoid fighter with deadly precision.
enemies.imp.name: Imp
enemies.imp.description: A small, mischievous demon that throws fireballs.
enemies.shadow-fiend.name: Shadow Fiend
enemies.shadow-fiend.description: A creature born from nightmares, phasing between shadows.
enemies.hellhound.name: Hellhound
enemies.hellhound.description: A fiery canine from the abyss, breathing brimstone.
enemies.succubus.name: Succubus
enemies.succubus.description: A seductive demon that drains life through dark magic.
enemies.arch-demon.name: Arch-Demon
enemies.arch-demon.description: A lord of the underworld, wreathed in hellfire and shadow.
enemies.dark-corrupter.name: Dark Corrupter
enemies.dark-corrupter.description: A shadowy entity seeking to corrupt the field.
enemies.wyvern.name: Wyvern
enemies.wyvern.description: A two-legged drake with venomous tail and leathery wings.
enemies.drake.name: Fire Drake
enemies.drake.description: A young dragon that breathes scorching flames.
enemies.crystal-dragon.name: Crystal Dragon
enemies.crystal-dragon.description: A dragon whose scales shimmer with prismatic energy.
enemies.elder-dragon.name: Elder Dragon
enemies.elder-dragon.description: An ancient wyrm of immeasurable power. Few survive its wrath.
enemies.goblin.name: Goblin Scout
enemies.goblin.description: A sneaky little creature armed with a crude dagger.
enemies.orc-warrior.name: Orc Warrior
enemies.orc-warrior.description: A brutal green-skinned fighter with a massive axe.
enemies.dark-mage.name: Dark Mage
enemies.dark-mage.description: A rogue sorcerer wielding forbidden magic.
enemies.bandit-leader.name: Bandit Leader
enemies.bandit-leader.description: A ruthless outlaw leading the attack on the northern field.
enemies.honor-knight.name: Honor Knight
enemies.honor-knight.description: A skilled knight testing worthy warriors in combat.
enemies.wild-spirit.name: Wild Spirit
enemies.wild-spirit.description: An unstable magical entity born from wild arcane energy.
enemies.arcane-book.name: Arcane Book
enemies.arcane-book.description: A sentient spellbook overflowing with chaotic magic.
enemies.plague-beast.name: Plague Beast
enemies.plague-beast.description: A twisted creature spreading the mysterious illness.
enemies.mimic.name: Mimic
enemies.mimic.description: A treasure chest that was never a treasure chest.
skills.bolt.name: Bolt
skills.bolt.description: Launch a bolt of arcane energy at your enemy.
skills.defend.name: Defend
skills.defend.description: Take a defensive stance to reduce incoming damage.
skills.flee.name: Flee
skills.slash.name: Slash
skills.slash.description: A powerful sword strike that deals heavy damage.
skills.smite.name: Smite
skills.smite.description: Channel holy energy to strike your enemy.
skills.fireball.name: Fireball
skills.fireball.description: Hurl a blazing fireball at your foes.
skills.holy.name: Holy Light
skills.holy.description: A radiant burst of divine energy.
skills.strike.name: Power Strike
skills.strike.description: A devastating blow that can shatter defenses.
